description_long: This hammer features a large, cylindrical double-sided head with a series of evenly spaced ridges along its length, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The head is colored a vivid red and appears to be constructed from a dense, durable material, likely metal or a heavy-duty composite. The handle is straight, rectangular in cross-section, and colored a muted yellow, suggesting a wooden or synthetic construction, and it connects centrally to the hammer head. The base of the handle is slightly wider, providing a stable grip and possibly preventing slippage during use. The overall design is reminiscent of a sledgehammer, intended for delivering powerful blows, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The surfaces are clean and unblemished, indicating the hammer is either new or very well maintained.
description: A robust, red double-sided sledgehammer with a ridged cylindrical head and a straight yellow handle, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks. The surfaces are clean and the construction appears solid and industrial.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed from the top, showing the octagonal faces of the head and the central alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the ridged, cylindrical red head and the straight yellow handle beneath it.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, highlighting the symmetry and the octagonal faces of the hammer head.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction of view 1, again showing the ridged head and straight handle, mirroring the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight rectangular handle, likely wood or synthetic, colored yellow, with a slightly widened base for grip.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided cylindrical sledgehammer head with pronounced ridges, colored red, designed for heavy striking.
